title: Hollow Knight Mimikyu [Cobblemon]
body:
This datpack adds an Hollow Knight themed Mimikyu form for the Cobblemon mod.

**Current Additions**
-  Knight Mimikyu\
  Spawns in Lush Caves and Ancient Cities\
  Trivia: Female Species have a [Delicate Flower](https://hollowknight.wiki/w/Delicate_Flower) on their left ear

**Installation**\
Place the datapack both in your "resourcepacks" folder and your world's "datapacks" folder.
